queries.question: For each movie set, list the equipment type used.
queries.sql: select movie_sets.title , equipment.type from Movie_sets_equipment join Equipment on Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Movie_sets on Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id = Movie_sets.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type WHERE {
  ?movie_sets_equipment a :Movie_sets_equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?movie_sets_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?movie_sets a :Movie_sets .
  ?movie_sets_equipment p:hasMovie_sets ?movie_sets .
  ?movie_sets p:title ?title .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: What items of equipment are there for every movie set?
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.name  from Movie_sets_equipment join Equipment on Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Movie_sets on Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id = Movie_sets.id   GROUP BY Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Movie_sets)

queries.question: Show me equipment type every movie set uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.type  from Movie_sets_equipment join Equipment on Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Movie_sets on Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id = Movie_sets.id   GROUP BY Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Movie_sets)

queries.question: For each movie set, show me the equipment name and type.
queries.sql: select movie_sets.title , equipment.name , equipment.type from Movie_sets_equipment join Equipment on Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Movie_sets on Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id = Movie_sets.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?movie_sets_equipment a :Movie_sets_equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?movie_sets_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?movie_sets a :Movie_sets .
  ?movie_sets_equipment p:hasMovie_sets ?movie_sets .
  ?movie_sets p:title ?title .
  ?equipment p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Give me the equipment name and type that is in common for all movie sets.
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.name, Equipment.type  from Movie_sets_equipment join Equipment on Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id = Equipment.id join Movie_sets on Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id = Movie_sets.id   GROUP BY Movie_sets_equipment.equipment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Movie_sets_equipment.movie_set_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Movie_sets)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me equipment type every movie set uses.
Give me the equipment names and types for each movie set.
What items of equipment are there for every movie set?
